channel.title: AI Research Brief
channel.description: Automated AI paper collection, ranking, and compact bilingual research briefs.

item.title: Improve model reasoning, planning, and verification, Strengthen multimodal understanding of charts, documents, and visual evidence, Make RAG retrieval and knowledge-base QA more reliable

item.content: Improve model reasoning, planning, and verification, Strengthen multimodal understanding of charts, documents, and visual evidence, Make RAG retrieval and knowledge base QA more reliable What is worth tracking today Today’s high signal papers point to: improve model reasoning, planning, and verification, strengthen multimodal understanding of charts, documents, and visual evidence, make RAG retrieval and knowledge base QA more reliable. The notes below focus on the core problem, method signal, main claim, and keywords for each featured paper. Featured papers: core problem, method signal, and keywords 1. improve model reasoning, planning, and verification
